data.command: export PATH="$HOME/go/bin:$HOME/bin:$PATH" && gt prime --hook && gt mail check --inject

message.content:
[GAS TOWN] deacon <- daemon • 2026-02-23T16:03 • patrol

I am Deacon. Start patrol: run gt deacon heartbeat, then check gt hook. If no hook, create mol-deacon-patrol wisp and execute it.

content.content:
? skogtown-wisp-wisp-13o7g [EPIC] · mol-deacon-patrol   [● P2 · HOOKED]
Assignee: deacon · Type: epic
Created: 2026-02-22 · Updated: 2026-02-22

DESCRIPTION
Deacon patrol cycle.

Monitors Gas Town agents (Mayor, Witnesses), processes lifecycle requests,
and handles escalations. Created as wisps (ephemeral, not synced to git).

CHILDREN
  ↳ ✓ skogtown-wisp-wisp-0c47i: Scan agent health ● P2
  ↳ ✓ skogtown-wisp-wisp-2ppi2: Decide: loop or hand off ● P2
  ↳ ✓ skogtown-wisp-wisp-la6qq: Check for orphaned processes ● P2
  ↳ ✓ skogtown-wisp-wisp-z8bqj: Check inbox for lifecycle requests and messages ● P2

content.thinking:
The hooked patrol wisp has all children marked as complete (✓). This patrol cycle is done. I should squash this wisp and create a new patrol cycle.

Let me check `bd mol current` to confirm there's no remaining step.

content.text: All steps on this patrol wisp are complete. Squashing and starting a new cycle.

input.command: gt mol squash --jitter 10s --summary "Previous patrol cycle complete, all steps done. Respawned by daemon."
input.description: Squash completed patrol wisp to digest

To start work on a molecule:
  bd mol pour <proto-id>      # Instantiate a molecule from template
  bd update <step-id> --status in_progress  # Claim a step
